name: minions-bundles-portfolio-workspace
description: Top-level structural organizational bundle — categories, ecosystems, projects
author: Mehdi Nabhani <mehdi@the-mehdi.com> (https://the-mehdi.com)

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @mxn2020/minions-bundles-portfolio-sdk run build && pnpm --filter @mxn2020/minions-bundles-portfolio-cli run build && pnpm --filter minions-bundles-portfolio-docs run build && pnpm --filter minions-bundles-portfolio-blog run build && pnpm --filter minions-bundles-portfolio-web run build
scripts.deploy:blog: pnpm --filter minions-bundles-portfolio-blog run build && netlify deploy --dir apps/blog/dist --prod
scripts.deploy:docs: pnpm --filter minions-bundles-portfolio-docs run build && netlify deploy --dir apps/docs/dist --prod
scripts.deploy:web: pnpm --filter minions-bundles-portfolio-web run build && netlify deploy --dir apps/web/dist --prod
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @mxn2020/minions-bundles-portfolio-sdk run build && pnpm --filter @mxn2020/minions-bundles-portfolio-sdk run lint && pnpm --filter @mxn2020/minions-bundles-portfolio-cli run lint
